_comment: Local service ad — 30s. Hook → Problem → Service shown → CTA. Best for plumbers, restaurants, repair, contractors, lawyers, etc. High-energy, action-driven, ends with phone + URL.

scenes.prompt: Dramatic close-up of SERVICE_VISUAL — e.g. a burst pipe spraying water, a flickering broken light fixture, an overgrown lawn — fast camera push-in, high energy, photo-real, no text or logos. Suggesting problem the service solves.
BROADER_PROBLEM_VISUAL — frustrated homeowner looking at the problem, hands on hips, dim domestic lighting. Subtle motion. No text or logos.
scenes.vo: Got a problem you can't fix? Don't waste your weekend on it.

scenes.prompt: Slow camera push-in toward the BUSINESS_NAME team/truck arriving with confidence. Warm lighting, professional appearance, slight smile. Suggesting competence and reliability.
scenes.vo: BUSINESS_NAME has been fixing SERVICE_AREA problems for OVER_X_YEARS years.
Fast response, fair pricing, work guaranteed.

scenes.headline: Call BUSINESS_NAME today
scenes.vo: Call PHONE_NUMBER or visit BUSINESS dot com today.
